plans.prompt: Find all unread emails from my manager this week that mention the product launch.

args.query: from: manager ("product launch" OR launch) newer_than:7d

plans.prompt: List all starred or labeled 'urgent' messages in my inbox from the last 14 days.
Find the email thread about the vendor contract renewal and extract any open questions or deadlines.
Create a draft to the customer success team letting them know the outage has been resolved and include the incident link.
Show me the last five emails I sent to the engineering alias.
Search my sent mail for anything about 'roadmap' from last month and open the most relevant one.
Read the full body of the security audit email and tell me the deadline for responses.

args.subject: Re: the contract renewal
args.body: Quick update: the contract renewal"contract renewal" newer_than:1d

plans.prompt: Find any unread messages from noreply addresses that look like important notifications.
Draft a follow-up to the PR review thread asking for an update on the remaining comments.

args.subject: Re: the review
args.body: Quick follow-up to the review — any updated details to follow.

plans.prompt: Show me all unread mail in the 'project-x' label.
Search for any attachments named something like 'report' or 'Q3' from the last two weeks.
Find the thread with the travel expenses and create a draft reply confirming the receipts are attached.
List recent messages that have the label 'waiting-for-reply' and are more than 5 days old.
